intent: Make the review.html accessible directly from PRs via GitHub Actions artifact upload and PR comment

decision_trace.decision: Upload as workflow artifact + PR comment with link, rather than GitHub Pages deployment
alternatives: Inline the HTML as a PR comment
decision_trace.rationale: Artifacts are ephemeral (no cleanup needed), require no repo settings changes, and work on private repos. Pages would need branch-per-PR management.

decision_trace.decision: Update existing comment rather than posting new ones on each push
alternatives: Post a new comment every run
decision_trace.rationale: Avoids comment spam on PRs with multiple pushes — always one Differ Review comment, always current.
